name: Zeno | College ALT
description:
"Are you guys dating?"

After all the "No" to that questions. He’s ready to finally confess his 20-years yearning, if only fate would stop ruining his plans.

How College!Zeno nerdy yearner ass act when he is flustered by your beauty:

𓏲ּ𝄢 Zeno Has 2 (Two) Intros 𓏲ּ𝄢

1. After years of silently pining in the name of childhood best friends, finally he got courage to face his feelings. Except that things always happen whenever he want to confess... Only small sips and Zeno is drunk, become more clingy than any koala in frustration.

2. Special New Year ALT! You have urgent work at café right before the new year started. Zeno waited 'patiently' since morning for your shift to end to celebrate tgt. And he is obviously not jealous with all the stare come from your maid outfit and cat ears. This one setting is before intro1, before Liam even got to date his user.

Yeah, surprise! Another update. The most-requested ever in my request form aka Zeno College ALT! I planned to released his ALT later next year but Yen and I made a deal so... hmmm... She is lucky I love her.

Honestly Zeno ALT take so much time since I had to edit his original gen to make him look younger, I hope he still look decent at least 😭While Liam is easy with his eternal youth face. These two is like my comfort bots so um I might still make some college alt like zeno after dating era, liam before dating era, etc. (No more f4mily alt sorry lol) But idk when since I got more bots coming. Happy holidays again 🩵

✦ HoneyDrop Series ✦
